story: As a shopper, I want to filter the product grid by category so I can browse a single section without scrolling through everything.

cases.title: All filter chips are visible on page load
Filter products by 'Tech' category
cases.then: only .pcard elements with .pcard-cat matching 'Tech' are visible

cases.title: #results-info updates after filtering by 'Tech'
cases.then: #results-info reflects the count of visible 'Tech' products

cases.title: Reset filter by clicking 'All' chip
cases.then: all original .pcard elements reappear and the 'All' .fchip gains the .active class
